summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is planned; low-signal closeout and fix PRs are disabled by the job artifact.

actions.reason: Ready-looking focused PR needs maintainer technical review; no mutation is allowed in this plan job.
Maintainer-owned broad feature work with waiting-on-author signal and failing checks should remain open outside this cleanup cluster.
Draft PR still needs proof and author/maintainer follow-up, but it is not low-signal or closable under this job.
Feature PR needs proof and review follow-up; no close action is permitted or justified.
Focused availability fix still needs real behavior proof and technical review; it is not safe to close as low-signal or superseded.

needs_human: #80396 requires maintainer technical correctness/merge-readiness judgment because it is marked ready for maintainer look with proof supplied, but this job blocks merge and fix actions.
